title: 'It's going to take a little bit of time' - Fleming on transition from Dhoni to Gaikwad
summary: "It's the management's call, not mine," CSK coach Stephen Fleming says of his own future with the team as their chance of entering the IPL 2026 playoffs hangs by a thread
